docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JACKSON, CONSUELO ADMINISTER ESTATE OF CLARA BROWN AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, DONALD MANAGER FUNERALS BY WASHINGTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, CONSUELO ADMINISTER ESTATE OF CLARA BROWN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED OCT-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, DONALD MANAGER FUNERALS BY WASHINGTON

DEFENDANT DONALD ROLLINS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE TESTIMONY AND EVIDENCE ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT WAS AN EMPLOYEE OF THE RESPONSIBLE PARTY FUNERALS BY WASHINGTON. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO CONSUELO JACKSON.
